T1.title: Baseline And Contract Audit
deliverables: Confirm publisher rejection, runner dispatch sites, runtime-variable prompt path, capability diagnostics, CLI maxConcurrency behavior, model fields, and affected tests.
Record implementation discoveries in the progress log before code edits.

T2.title: Publisher Directive Surface
deliverables: Add WorkflowFanoutDispatchDirective parallel to WorkflowCrossWorkflowDispatchDirective.
Expose WorkflowPublicationResult.fanoutDispatch.
Replace supported local fanout rejection with directive emission.
Keep typed diagnostics for unsupported fanout combinations.

T3.title: Runner Fanout Dispatch Core
deliverables: Resolve itemsFrom using JSON Pointer and fail actionably for missing or non-array values.
Run branch sub-paths with bounded structured concurrency using the effective fanout concurrency cap.
Bind itemVariable per branch, isolate branch session/store state, stop branches before joinStepId, and aggregate records in input order.
Implement fail-fast cancellation and collect-all aggregation/failure.
Consume publishResult.fanoutDispatch at both runner dispatch sites.
verification: Focused tests for bounded overlap, deterministic input-order aggregation, and fail-fast cancellation

T4.title: Join Injection And Prompt Variable Path
deliverables: Build runtimeVariables.fanoutJoin with fanoutGroupRunId, group/source/target/join identifiers, resultOrder, failurePolicy, and ordered branch records.
Append one joined workflow message to joinStepId.
Merge fanoutJoin into effective request variables before executing the join step.
Continue execution at joinStepId after successful fanout completion.
verification: Focused test asserting join step reads runtimeVariables.fanoutJoin

T5.title: Write Ownership And Capability Diagnostics
deliverables: Validate read-only and disjoint-paths before branch launch.
Reject unsafe disjoint path declarations and isolated-workspace with specific diagnostics.
Remove blanket fanout unsupported gap for supported local fanout.
Wire run.maxConcurrency as a fanout cap and update CLI help/validation text.
verification: CLI help or validation tests covering --max-concurrency, if available

T6.title: Fixtures And End-To-End Workflow Scenarios
writeScope: workflow fixture/scenario files under existing test/example directories
deliverables: Add deterministic fanout mock scenario completing with exitCode 0.
Add tests for fanoutJoin ordering, out-of-order stability, bounded concurrency, fail-fast cancellation, collect-all aggregation, publisher directive emission, and capability preflight.
Preserve existing non-fanout mock scenario counts: 29 nodeExecutions, 28 transitions, exitCode 0.
Run has_feature_fanout:true path to step5-feature-plan-join without unsupportedTransition.
verification: New fanout mock-scenario command recorded after fixture path is known
Existing non-fanout mock-scenario command recorded after fixture path is confirmed

T7.title: Full Verification And Documentation Refresh
deliverables: Run and record full verification set.
Confirm no throwaway artifacts outside tmp/bounded-fanout-join-workflow-execution/.
Confirm no commit or push unless explicitly requested.
Refresh documentation only for factual implementation deltas.

T3: existing run recursion and cross-workflow dispatch structure

parallelizableTasks.condition: after T1; write scopes remain disjoint until capability tests are updated
after fanout contract is confirmed; fixture execution still depends on T3-T5

verification: new fanout mock scenario command once fixture path is known
existing non-fanout mock scenario command confirming 29 nodeExecutions, 28 transitions, exitCode 0 once fixture path is confirmed
completionCriteria: WorkflowFanoutDispatchDirective is emitted for supported live local fanout.
DeterministicWorkflowRunner executes fanout branch sub-paths with true bounded concurrency and input-order aggregation.
runtimeVariables.fanoutJoin reaches joinStepId and includes ordered branch records plus fanoutGroupRunId.
fail-fast, collect-all, read-only, disjoint-paths, unsupported isolated-workspace, capability diagnostics, and CLI maxConcurrency behavior are tested.
New fanout scenario completes with exitCode 0.
Existing non-fanout mock scenario remains 29 nodeExecutions, 28 transitions, exitCode 0.
Full verification commands and results are recorded in the progress log.
No scratch artifacts are left outside tmp/bounded-fanout-join-workflow-execution/.
progressLogExpectations: Append a dated entry before handoff.
Include completed task ids, files changed, verification commands with pass/fail status, exact scenario commands once known, blockers tied to design sections, and intentional divergences with owner.

addressedFeedback.finding: Progress tracker marked generic TASK-001..TASK-006 as Completed while the active plan had T1-T7 NOT_STARTED.
addressedFeedback.resolution: Replaced tracker with T1-T7 task ids, dependencies, NOT_STARTED statuses, disjoint parallelization conditions, verification commands, completion criteria, and progress-log expectations aligned to the active plan.
